note: LAUNCH NICHE: clinics & studios that live on appointments. (1) Dental/medical clinics — booking by phone + website, lose revenue to missed calls, no-shows, lapsed patients. (2) Aesthetics/beauty/fitness studios — booking via Instagram/WhatsApp DMs + phone, lose leads when DMs go unanswered. ONE playbook serves both: missed-call text-back, instant web/DM enquiry replies, reminders, reactivation. A missed enquiry = lost revenue. Copy this to config/icp.json (gitignored) and edit. Don't fan out to other verticals until this niche is proven.
